user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new unpaid time off type, so that employees can request unpaid leave categories such as maternity or sabbatical.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Unpaid Time Off screen; When I click Add new unpaid time off and enter the type, number of days, and tracking unit; Then the unpaid time off type is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view unpaid time off types with number of time offs, tracking unit, FMLA flag, and applicability, so that I can review the unpaid leave catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Unpaid Time Off screen; When the list loads; Then I see each type's number of time off(s), hours/days tracking, FMLA time off type, and applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing unpaid time off type, so that I can update its allowance or applicability.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Unpaid Time Off screen; When I click Edit on an unpaid time off row and change its values; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of an unpaid time off type, so that I can confirm its configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Unpaid Time Off screen; When I click View on a row; Then the unpaid time off type details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the unpaid time off list, so that I see the latest configured types.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Unpaid Time Off screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current types
